metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for full-stack cloud engineering — .NET hexagonal architecture, React frontend, Terraform/Helm infrastructure, and end-to-end development workflow orchestration.

plugins.name: dotnet-architect
plugins.description: Hexagonal architecture scaffolding and enforcement for .NET microservices — CQRS commands/queries, domain entities, EF Core migrations, architecture validation, and deep code review.

plugins.name: react-developer
plugins.description: React + TypeScript frontend scaffolding and browser verification — feature modules, Playwright screenshots, smoke testing, and visual regression checks.

plugins.name: cloud-infra
plugins.description: Terraform + Helm infrastructure scaffolding, linting, and review — module scaffolding, chart templates, validation pipelines, and infrastructure-specific code review.

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: End-to-end development workflow — PRD generation, feature planning, GitHub issue creation, branch management, quality gates, parallel code review, and PR creation.
